typo3/cms-beuser.description: TYPO3 CMS Backend User - TYPO3 backend module Administration > Users for managing backend users and groups.
TYPO3 CMS Backend User - TYPO3 backend module System>Backend Users for managing backend users and groups.
Backend user administration and overview. Allows you to compare the settings of users and verify their permissions and see who is online.
